title: Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace 1
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 1}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:TPMmanga1.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Manga:
The Phantom Menace'' 1 |writer=[[George Lucas]] |penciller=[[Kia Asamiya]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist=[[Kia Asamiya]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[December 22]], [[1999]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54222/star_wars_episode_i_-_the_phantom_menace_manga_1999_1|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace Manga (1999) #1}} |pages=88 |upc= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |series=''[[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace]]'' |issue=1 of 2 }} '''''Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace'' 1''' '''1''' is the first issue in the ''[[Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace]]'' series of comics. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[December 22]], [[1999]]. {{Comics-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''You waited in line for months to see the movie…You read the comics…You ate the fruit snacks and played with the action figures! Now make sure you don't miss the most exciting retelling of the movie of the century as Dark Horse presents ''Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace—Manga!'' Legendary manga artist Kia Asamiya (''Silent Mobius'' and ''Steam Detectives'') masterfully illustrates George Lucas' tale of adventure and intrigue in a book that no ''Star Wars'' fan will want to miss!'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:TPMmanga1.jpg|Cover File:Star_Wars_Manga_TPM1.png|Cover art ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] *[[Been]] *[[Sio Bibble/Legends|Sio Bibble]] *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]] *[[Jull Dremon]] *[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] *[[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]] *[[Tey How/Legends|Tey How]] *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] *[[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]] *[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *[[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] *[[Sabé/Legends|Sabé]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] *[[Slarm (Gungan)|Slarm]] *[[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Roos Tarpals]] *[[Teers/Legends|Teers]] *[[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]] |organisms= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= |miscellanea= }} ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/comics/news20000105.html|text=''Phantom'' Goes Manga}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54222/star_wars_episode_i_-_the_phantom_menace_manga_1999_1|text=Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace Manga (1999) #1}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: მანგა: ფარული მუქარა 1 }} [[Category:Star Wars Manga: The Phantom Menace issues|01]]
